summary: Unnecessary PowerShell installation on ubuntu-latest (pwsh already available, wastes ~30s per job). PowerShell + Pester setup duplicated identically across 3 jobs (~75 lines total, should use composite action). Two test harness scripts (run-all-tests.ps1 vs run-act-tests.ps1) doing overlapping work violates DRY. Script parameters (SecretConfigs) defined but unused—workflow dot-sources and defines data inline instead. test-markdown-output job lacks output assertions (only JSON validates). Functional but fragile; any install step change requires updates in 3+ places.
